title: Side-by-Side Diff View with Sticky Headers

findings.description: Side-by-side mode toggle button exists and is clickable. The diff toolbar shows Unified and Side-by-side as toggle buttons. However, the diff view currently only shows a file list (not expanded file diffs), so sticky headers on the actual side-by-side code view could not be verified.
File rows in the diff list do not expand to show inline diff content when clicked. The file list appears to be display-only with Mark reviewed buttons.
